What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman in a yellow and green tunic wields a blue lightsaber against a bald man projecting blue lightning. The bald man holds a red lightsaber while soldiers fight in the forest background. A blue-skinned humanoid stands in a stone hall near a cloaked figure. Red and green lightsaber blades clash against mechanical gauntlets in the foreground.

Describe the sequence of combat events and character appearances throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a woman lunges with a blue lightsaber against blue lightning; at 2s, a bald man holds a red lightsaber while projecting energy; at 6s, a hooded figure appears before a battle with fire; at 12s, a blue-skinned humanoid stands near figures igniting green and blue blades; at 18s, a red blade clashes against a green blade held by a man with a mechanical gauntlet.
